Characters. I loved Sophie. She broke the norm. Everyone expected her to be prim and proper with daddies money, but she was incredible. Feisty, stuck up for herself, and went after what she wanted, with no shame or doubt. She had a few obstacles to get over, but she got there eventually.

Callum, I was torn between loving him, and not being quite sure. He was fiercely loyal, and dangerously sexy, but I felt sorry for him too much. He had been through some seriously bad crap in his life, and he had such low self esteem for it. And sometimes I wished he would 'Masque up'. Let his inner sex god Dom, come out to play. He did sometimes, and those scenes were epic! But other times, it was obvious that he was struggling with issues, and I wasn't sure if I wanted to hug him or jump him, or shower him with lots of soap. I know his circumstances were bad, and out of his control, and he was a complete survivor for it though. And I felt truly satisfied for the ending. It was perfection for him.

Becs/Rebecca/Raven OMG!! I LOVE her so much, she really is an epic character. I loved her in Dirty Bad Wrong and was thrilled to see her back in Dirty Bad Savage. She can do no wrong in my eyes. Hilariously funny, sexy, down to earth, and always helping out others in need, made up to perfection. I so need to see her have her own book!!

Of course, it wouldn't be perfect without the AMAZING appearance from Masque and Cat!! They were awesome as ever, and his presence on those few pages, was completely page melting. That man is sex. End of.

So quick round up, after a ridiculously long review. If you got to this point, thank you and well done, I'm not sure I would of. ;)
This book was exactly what I hoped it would be. It literally hums to it's own tune. I couldn't compare it to any other book, it's completely unique. It's also addictive, sexy, very dark at times, thrilling, and also quite sad. But it's stupidly epic! And the ending is perfect!
The writing style hooked me in straight away, just like it did in the first book. The raw and gritty world, author Jade West paints with her words, is incomparable to others in this genre. She nails this style of book with total ease. And I can't wait to see what's next in this series!

4.5 Savage Stars!

Dirty Bad Strangers Review:

Good god that was intense!!
After the crazy addictive ride that was Dirty Bad Wrong, followed by another whirlwind of all things nasty but hot with Dirty Bad Savage, I was more than ready and eager for Dirty Bad Strangers.
The synopsis was hotter than hot, and held so much mystery, and the promise of another filthy and twisted story, that you can't help but devour in one sitting.
So when seeing this bad boy show up on my kindle, I was more than excited, and pulled an intense all nighter on it. I most definitely wasn't disappointed.

This book in some respects was even better than it's predecessors. More nasty, more dirty, more twisted, and so much more hotter. But with the added incredible bonus, of one of the most awesome main characters in recent dark books, Gemma.
With her mane of fiery red hair, generous and voluptuous curves. She was gorgeous in a natural way. She is not your stereotypical protagonist in books, she is so much better. She is real, and sexy and has a great attitude and personality to boot. Gemma's kink was a bit different and bit risky, but she didn't care. She knew what she wanted, and she would have it.

Jason, her dark and mysterious caller, luckily turns out to not be a psycho with murder in mind. But everything else he has in mind is pretty nasty and twisted, and of course sinfully hot. Just like him. He also shows throughout the book, that he is far from the shallow world he has one foot in, and I loved him for it.

As with all the other Dirty Bad books, the sex scenes in this book are crazy hot. They aren't conventional and run of the mill, they are serious kink and stupidly steamy. And I think that's why I always get so excited about reading this series. You never know what you are going to get, or what you are going to read next. It's different and shows another world, a world where people are free to explore their desires, and nobody will mock them for it.

As with the other 2 books in this series, there is always a connection between them all. Club Explicit and the regulars that frequent it. There is usually 1 or more characters from the previous books that show up, which I love. This time it's the sweet and bubbly Cara, who is Raven (Bec's) girlfriend. She turns out to me a good friend to Gemma, and introduces her to Explicit, and a new family of friends. I love how they all come back at some point. Even if the hotter than hot, Masque only had a brief moment, it was still nice to see him back. ;)

I 100% recommend this book, and of course the series. Although it is a standalone, the entire series has been incredible, and definitely worth reading. If you love your books hot, but a little different and extremely exciting. This is definitely the book for you.

"I'm not going anywhere, dirty girl, the night is young."

Overall Review:
Amazingly bad, and dirty. Incredibly well written, and sexy as sin. Gripping, with real characters, and intense situations. A Must Read Box Set!!

5 Stars.

Reviewed for Seraphim Book Reviews & Dark Seraph Book Blog.
top_rant.title: A Dirty, Bad Box set of perfection! 5 Huge filthy stars!

top_rant.text:
I figure I'll make a note about each story as I read them, so far as a whole the book is definitely worthy of 5 stars!

Sole by Alessandra Torres- This can be read by itself, but it's about the couple from Hollywood Dirt which I haven't read yet. But reading this story bout a birthday party they have for one of their children only served to make me want their WHOLE story and to know how they got their HEA in the first place!

Begging for More by Kim Karr- This is a story about a couple from Toxic, but they weren't the main characters in that story. James and Lindsay go on a last minute, spur of the moment trip to Vegas after basically just meeting each other. Things get hot....and heavy in a very serious way.

Heartbreak by Skye Warren- Okay...I'm not sure how I feel about this one. It's great writing...don't get me wrong, but I was so pissed off after reading it that I couldn't think clearly. Basically it's about a girl named Hannah who makes the decision to tell a HUGE LIE about a guy named Blue that has the potential to ruin the rest of his life. She did this after he saved her from something horrible! She has her excuses as to why she did it but none of them make sense to me, they just made me mad. Their story continues in Better When it Hurts and I'm definitely going to read it because I'm really hoping that Hannah suffers deeply from her grave mistake. Horrible of me, I know...

Naughty Wishes by Sarah Castille- I'm pretty sure this is a complete standalone story... I think. Dan and Kylie have a good marriage but it's lacking th spark after so many years together. For Kylie's birthday Dan decides to enact one of her secret fantasies that he knows about from the books she reads. This story was so hot! And the fact that the fantasy ended up rekindling that missing spark and reminding them why they loved each other so much in the first place warmed my heart. Loved it.

His First and Only by Alexa Riley- A complete story all by itself, and perfect Alexa in every way. Ethan has been searching for Tiffany ever since they were kids. When he finally finds her he's willing to move heaven and earth to make her his. Lucky for him, she's been missing him even more than usual lately ad is more than happy to be swept off her feet and taken away (literally....this is Alexa Riley we're talking about!)

Decadent Knights by Julia Sykes- Smith and Lydia have their story in Knight (Impossible Love #4), this short scene is after they've already been together for 2 years. Smith rescued Lydia from an abusive place and has dedicated himself to rebuilding her self esteem and making her feel safe and loved. He proves to her just how beautiful she really is with the help of a fellow Dom and friend named Dex. It takes place in a BDSM club but is one of the most loving and meaningful sex scenes ever.

A Lake George Christmas by Debra Presley- Abby and Danny fall in love in Finding Us (A Nucci Securites novel). This story is just a romantic and heart warming account of their first Christmas together. I'm definitely going to go back and read their book!

Advent by Nina Lane- Dean and Liv have their own book called Arouse: Book One. This story takes place towards the beginning of their relationship. Liv has agreed to spend the 2 week holiday break with Dean with her own assumption that this is probably the last time they'll get to spend together. Dean plans on proving to her that this isn't temporary and that he wants to be with her always. My favorite part was her homemade Christmas gift to him. I swear it brought tears to my eyes...you just have to read it and see for yourself. I'll be starting this whole series ASAP!

Looking for a Complication by Tamsen Parker- I admit to not finishing this one. It wasn't the story, it's just that it's F/F which isn't my thing. I just don't get into it.

Test Driving the Billionaire- A standalone. Great story about a girl who has had it for her boss for years, but never thought he felt the same way. Come to find out, he's wanted her too. They have explosive sex way worth reading!

Delay of Game by Jen Fredericks- A complete story by itself. A best friends to lovers story that's sweet and warms your heart. One of those things where everyone seems to know they belong together except for them.

Her First Choice by Lynda Chance- They had met once years ago and hadn't had anything to do with each other since. Unbeknownst to the other, they had each had plenty of fantasies about the other. After she endures a bad break up they hook up at a bar and it's like fate finally thought the time was right. What starts as a revenge fling turns into something more.

Sympathy for the Devil by Cynthia Rayne- A unique story that doesn't really have an HEA. It's a scorching hot one-time encounter between a woman and a man who's been hired to kill her. Her ex is the one who took out the hit, and this guy knows what a jerk her ex was to her. He's been around them both long enough that he feels tenderness towards her and knows she's better than what she was getting.

Trailer Park Eden by C.J. Roberts- WTF??!!??!! I don't know what else to say. Easily one of the top 2 stories in this anthology. It's dark, and sad...and just so WRONG. It's a set of twins- brother and sister. But there's so much more going on with them. He's deaf, she's blind- together they complete each other...literally. No one cares for them except each other, and that's all they have in the world. The end says that if you want a full novel about them then to let the author know. YES!!!! WE NEED A FULL NOVEL, LIKE YESTERDAY!!!

It Takes Two by Nikki Sloane- The queen of threesomes doesn't let us down! This is a standalone story but is centered in the world of her Blindfold club. There's porn made with two guys and girl, and it's hot. That's basically the story, and it's perfect.

Heart of Eve by Pam Godwin- Unlike anything I've ever read, it's a post-apocolyptic story. A former priest and a girl struggling to survive and confused about their feelings for the other. It's part of a series of books, and after reading this I immediately went to get them. But then I read that throughout the series there are THREE important men in her life. So now I'm scared. Because I loved Roark and the idea of her not being exclusively with him doesn't set good with me. Does he die? Does she leave him? I have no idea, and frankly I'm scared to find out! Especially after I read in a review that the whole time she had spent with Roark she was pining over her someone else, and that it may not be finished with that someone. That was just eluded to in a review so I don't know the exact truth, but it's enough to scare me into taking a serious look at whether I should read the series or not. I don't like being pissed off and hurt...

Steal My Breath by Nina Levine- A cliffhanger!!!!!! WARNING!!! This story is great but it's NOT complete! It's basically an introduction to the new book she has coming out. You'll read this and want more instantly! We have NO idea what's going to happen with Luke and Callie, and we're already rooting for them!

Rapunzel's First Knight by Shoshanna Evers- A romantic take on the Rapunzel story. I enjoyed it right up to the moment that they DIDN'T have sex. Come on!! The story ends and she's still a "virgin captive"! Sure, it sounds like it'll be happening in the future, but this is an erotic read....I want to read about it happening.

Swept Away by Anna Zaires- Another top favorite in the group. The only books I'd read by this author were her Twist Me series and Capture Me series. I've never read a science fiction erotic romance EVER...and it looks like I've been missing out! i'm going to read all of the Krinar Chronicles now. Especially since it says we get more of Arus and Delia! Arus is an alien and Delia is a peasant (human). He saves her life, and in so doing is attracted to her. It's sweet, but then gets sexy. I really enjoyed it.

Unique by Avery Aster- An exciting story full of twists, crime, and betrayal...but it isn't complete! It says it's going to be a full length novel soon as part of the Manhattanites series, but until then we're left wondering what happens!

Owned by Jenika Snow- A complete story...as you can tell, I like that. Rose finds herself through a series of hardships offering up her virginity at an auction for some rich guy to buy. The guy ends up being her boss who she thought hated her, but really he's been longing for her from afar. Their first time together? I admit to reading the whole thing SEVERAL times. #OneHandedReading

What a fantastic set of stories!! my top 3 favorites would be His First and Only by Alexa Riley, Trailer Park Eden by C.J. Roberts and Swept Away by Anna Zaires. But honestly, there isn't a single bad story in the bunch!
top_rant.title: Full of sexy, great reads!!  Best anthology I've ever read!

top_rant.text:
I read the ENTIRE series of ‘Dark Secrets’ by Angela M Hudson and it was INCREDIBLE 🤯🤯🤯! (FYI, I’m not affiliated with the author, not in the book biz, reading is just a HOBBY, and I’m just a regular reader that is super passionate 💗 about spreading the word on GREAT books!) There are NO spoilers 🙌🏻!

OK ✅! So this is a series of 15 books (9 main books, and 6 spin-offs!) I read these BEFORE I started writing these emoji 🤪 reviews (which is why there wasn’t one written before!) But there are several series like this that I want to circle ⭕️ back to and write ✍️ an emoji review ... and thought I’d kick it off 🦵 with this one 👏🏻👏🏻👏🏻!

This will give you EVERYTHING you need to know 🙌🏻… without spoilers 🥳... to determine if this series is for you 💕! There are TONS of posts about this series on FB and I’m going to try to answer all those questions 🙌🏻!!

So first off 🤗! What is the series even about?! Well! It actually starts off A LOT like Twilight 🧛(sorry Angie 😆!) After a tragedy, Ara travels from Australia 🇦🇺 to America 🇺🇸 to live with her dad and go to highschool 🏫 ! Where she then meets a HANDSOME, GREEN eyed 👀 … vampire 😱! He’s MYSTERIOUS 🕵️‍♂️ and she’s SMITTEN 😍! NO ONE has EVER held his attention before like Ara ❤️ and we soon get swept into a sweet romance 💘…. UNTIL… well… BOOM 💥! We DON’T 😵! Muhahahahaa 😈😈😈! By the end of the first book you realize this is NOT TWILIGHT 🩸! It’s an entirely UNIQUE and CRAZY 😲 story that kicks off at the MASQUERADE 🎭 BALL (FYI around 80% into first book!) and the insane ride doesn’t stop until the FINAL book 😱!

So much to say 👏🏻👏🏻👏🏻! OK! The BIGGEST thing to mention is this author is a MASTERMIND 🧠 (aka EVIL 😈 MASTERMIND!) at plot twists 🌪 ! You LITERALLY have NO idea what is going to happen next! EVERY book is like PEELING away a layer of an ONION 🧅 to only find out in the FINAL book you were eating an ORANGE 🍊 ALL ALONG! A very, VERY large COMPLICATED ORANGE 😂😂😂!) There is soooo much EMOTION 😩 in these books! You literally want to THROW your DEVICE 📱 (seriously, Angie!! … you NEED a device throwing warning ⚠️!) … and other times, you want to SOB 😭 away with a box of tissues and a bottle of wine 🍷!

These characters!! BOY, can they annoy the CRAP out of you 😂😂😂! But at the SAME time, you still feel SO attached to their journeys! We have our main girl, Ara 👗, who starts off super immature (she is YOUNG!!) … but does GROW 🌱 as the series progresses 👏🏻! YES, the first book takes place in highschool. BUT 🤚🏻! After that, it launches 🚀 into a more ADULT series (and thank you 🙏🏻 thank you 🙏🏻 thank you 🙏🏻 Angie that she is no longer in high school 🥳!) DAVID, Ara’s handsome green-eyed 👀 VAMP, is actually the PURE definition of EVIL 👿! But he’s HOT 🥵 as well (so there’s that 😅!) Seriously, it is sooooo REFRESHING 🌬 to get a VAMPIRE 🧛 story where the VAMPIRES actually don’t give a YOU KNOW WHAT about eating their FOOD 🩸! Oh & get this!! … HOT 🥵 David has a HOT 🥵 BROTHER… a TWIN BROTHER 😮! JASON!! Oh my goodness… JASE ❤️ JASE ❤️ JASE ❤️… nom 🤤 nom 🤤 nom 🤤! Let me tell you, LOVING ❤️‍🔥 on DAVID or LOVING ❤️‍🔥 on JASE is like FIGHTING 🤺 words 🤣🤣🤣! People tend to be DIEHARD 😍 David fans or DIEHARD 😍 Jase fans! And YES… this is a LOVE ❤️ TRIANGLE 🔺! But! For those of you who don’t like them… just KNOW 💡… the author is BIG TIME into HEA’s and you WILL GET ONE 🥳… for EVERYONE 🙌🏻… errrr … EVENTUALLY 🤣😂🤣! HONESTLY, there are so many twists 🌪 & turns ↩️, I didn’t even know who Ara would end up with until Book 15 😲😲😲! And there is NO way you can guess this ending BTW! I PROMISE ✌🏻!

Now speaking of books… YES… there are A LOT 😆! BUT! For those of you who don’t want to invest the time for 15 straight books… there are NATURAL breaking points along the way 🥳! Book 6 feels like it has a HEA 💘 at the end, so does Book 9 (it’s a spin-off) and so does Book 12 (it’s also a spin-off!) ANY of those times is a GREAT 👍🏻 time to take a break 🏝 and read something else for a bit (and then come back for MORE emotional devastation later 😂!) Cuz let me tell ya… this series is EMOTIONALLY DEVISTATING 😩😩😩! It has it's DARK moments… and a helluva lot of secrets 🤫… hence ‘DARK SECRETS!’ 😉😉😉 There may be some triggers for some (cough* cough* torture 🔪 ) but outside of THAT 😆, other than ABSOLUTE EMOTIONAL AGONY 😭😭😭… it’s not TOO bad compared to other dark series out there 👍🏻!!

And speaking of emotional AGONY 😩! HOLY BOJANGLES 😲! The three spin-offs ‘In Another Life’… WHAT. THE. HECK. ANGIE!!!!!!! 😩😩😩 I literally put my book down, walked to the gas station, bought a bottle of wine 🍷, got some tissues, and then SOBBED 😭😭😭 my eyes out while yep, continuing to reading IAL Book 3 😂😂😂! TO THIS DAY, with all the books I have read (and if you follow my reviews, you know there are QUITE a FEW 😉😂!,) I think this one takes the emotional CAKE 🎂! It was so GENIUS 💡, but SO HEARTBREAKING 💔💔💔! For all who wonder what’s the deal with the IAL books… it’s a VISION 💭 being shown to Ara of what COULD have happened. But it’s KEY 🔑 to the main saga, so they can’t be skipped! And if you thought the MAIN SAGA was BRUTAL 😩… WOW 😲… just imagine how bad THIS is since it is literally NOT the path that was chosen for Ara because it is MORE BRUTAL than the MAIN SAGA 😲😲😲!

A lot of people start this series and mistakenly think it is YA. And I GET IT 👌🏻! MOST of book 1 feels that way! But just HOLD on to your HATS 🎩 folks, it is soooooo NOT YA and once you get on that emotional rollercoaster 🎢 … it just does NOT STOP! There is STEAM 🔥 (NOT tons, but the non-romantic plotline is SO engrossing, you literally don’t care!) There is DRAMA 🎭 ! There are MIND BLOWING 🤯 twists 🌪 ! There is EMOTIONAL AGONY 😩😭😩! Honestly, it’s a BRILLIANT 💡series and the writing is TOP NOTCH 🤌🏻! This lady KNOWS what she is doing 👏🏻! There really is nothing else out there like this series! I usually try to say when recommending books… “If you like this series, then you’ll like this series.” But I LITERALLY CANNOT 🚫 with this one. There is NOTHING out there like this!!!

So if you LOVE to be constantly SUPRISED 😲 & SHOCKED 😵, you LOVE to read series that make you want to THROW YOUR BOOK 📕 (watch out, cuz it has happened to someone 😅!,) you LOVE the emotional AGONY 😩 of a love triangle 🔺 … but at the same time, LOVE that you KNOW 💡 it will ALL WORK OUT RIGHT in the end 💗💗💗… give this series a shot! It’s free on KU and you never know, it may JUST be the best kept SECRET 🤫 of a series that is PERFECTLY DARK 👌🏻 for you!

FYI Perfect Reading Order below (Spin-offs are CRUCIAL to main saga! Recommend getting the boxset with all books in the right order!)

💗Dark Secrets
💗The Heart's Ashes
💗Mark of Betrayal
💗Lies in Blood
💗Echoes: Part One of Echoes & Silence
💗Echoes: Part Two of Echoes & Silence
💜Bound 1 (spin-off)
💜Bound 2 (spin-off)
💗Bound by Secrets
🤍In Another Life 1 (spin-off)
🤍In Another Life 2 (spin-off)
🤍In Another Life 3 (spin-off)
🖤In My Blood (spin-off)
💗Heart of Darkness
💗Underworld

Dark Secrets (all 15 Books!) by Angela M. Hudson

top_rant.title: MOST UNPREDICTABLE SERIES EVER!

top_rant.text:
I read the ENTIRE series of ‘Dark Secrets’ by Angela M Hudson and it was INCREDIBLE 🤯🤯🤯! (FYI, I’m not affiliated with the author, not in the book biz, reading is just a HOBBY, and I’m just a regular reader that is super passionate 💗 about spreading the word on GREAT books!) There are NO spoilers 🙌🏻!

OK ✅! So this is a series of 15 books (9 main books, and 6 spin-offs!) I read these BEFORE I started writing these emoji 🤪 reviews (which is why there wasn’t one written before!) But there are several series like this that I want to circle ⭕️ back to and write ✍️ an emoji review ... and thought I’d kick it off 🦵 with this one 👏🏻👏🏻👏🏻!

This will give you EVERYTHING you need to know 🙌🏻… without spoilers 🥳... to determine if this series is for you 💕! There are TONS of posts about this series on FB and I’m going to try to answer all those questions 🙌🏻!!

So first off 🤗! What is the series even about?! Well! It actually starts off A LOT like Twilight 🧛(sorry Angie 😆!) After a tragedy, Ara travels from Australia 🇦🇺 to America 🇺🇸 to live with her dad and go to highschool 🏫 ! Where she then meets a HANDSOME, GREEN eyed 👀 … vampire 😱! He’s MYSTERIOUS 🕵️‍♂️ and she’s SMITTEN 😍! NO ONE has EVER held his attention before like Ara ❤️ and we soon get swept into a sweet romance 💘…. UNTIL… well… BOOM 💥! We DON’T 😵! Muhahahahaa 😈😈😈! By the end of the first book you realize this is NOT TWILIGHT 🩸! It’s an entirely UNIQUE and CRAZY 😲 story that kicks off at the MASQUERADE 🎭 BALL (FYI around 80% into first book!) and the insane ride doesn’t stop until the FINAL book 😱!

So much to say 👏🏻👏🏻👏🏻! OK! The BIGGEST thing to mention is this author is a MASTERMIND 🧠 (aka EVIL 😈 MASTERMIND!) at plot twists 🌪 ! You LITERALLY have NO idea what is going to happen next! EVERY book is like PEELING away a layer of an ONION 🧅 to only find out in the FINAL book you were eating an ORANGE 🍊 ALL ALONG! A very, VERY large COMPLICATED ORANGE 😂😂😂!) There is soooo much EMOTION 😩 in these books! You literally want to THROW your DEVICE 📱 (seriously, Angie!! … you NEED a device throwing warning ⚠️!) … and other times, you want to SOB 😭 away with a box of tissues and a bottle of wine 🍷!

These characters!! BOY, can they annoy the CRAP out of you 😂😂😂! But at the SAME time, you still feel SO attached to their journeys! We have our main girl, Ara 👗, who starts off super immature (she is YOUNG!!) … but does GROW 🌱 as the series progresses 👏🏻! YES, the first book takes place in highschool. BUT 🤚🏻! After that, it launches 🚀 into a more ADULT series (and thank you 🙏🏻 thank you 🙏🏻 thank you 🙏🏻 Angie that she is no longer in high school 🥳!) DAVID, Ara’s handsome green-eyed 👀 VAMP, is actually the PURE definition of EVIL 👿! But he’s HOT 🥵 as well (so there’s that 😅!) Seriously, it is sooooo REFRESHING 🌬 to get a VAMPIRE 🧛 story where the VAMPIRES actually don’t give a YOU KNOW WHAT about eating their FOOD 🩸! Oh & get this!! … HOT 🥵 David has a HOT 🥵 BROTHER… a TWIN BROTHER 😮! JASON!! Oh my goodness… JASE ❤️ JASE ❤️ JASE ❤️… nom 🤤 nom 🤤 nom 🤤! Let me tell you, LOVING ❤️‍🔥 on DAVID or LOVING ❤️‍🔥 on JASE is like FIGHTING 🤺 words 🤣🤣🤣! People tend to be DIEHARD 😍 David fans or DIEHARD 😍 Jase fans! And YES… this is a LOVE ❤️ TRIANGLE 🔺! But! For those of you who don’t like them… just KNOW 💡… the author is BIG TIME into HEA’s and you WILL GET ONE 🥳… for EVERYONE 🙌🏻… errrr … EVENTUALLY 🤣😂🤣! HONESTLY, there are so many twists 🌪 & turns ↩️, I didn’t even know who Ara would end up with until Book 15 😲😲😲! And there is NO way you can guess this ending BTW! I PROMISE ✌🏻!

Now speaking of books… YES… there are A LOT 😆! BUT! For those of you who don’t want to invest the time for 15 straight books… there are NATURAL breaking points along the way 🥳! Book 6 feels like it has a HEA 💘 at the end, so does Book 9 (it’s a spin-off) and so does Book 12 (it’s also a spin-off!) ANY of those times is a GREAT 👍🏻 time to take a break 🏝 and read something else for a bit (and then come back for MORE emotional devastation later 😂!) Cuz let me tell ya… this series is EMOTIONALLY DEVISTATING 😩😩😩! It has it's DARK moments… and a helluva lot of secrets 🤫… hence ‘DARK SECRETS!’ 😉😉😉 There may be some triggers for some (cough* cough* torture 🔪 ) but outside of THAT 😆, other than ABSOLUTE EMOTIONAL AGONY 😭😭😭… it’s not TOO bad compared to other dark series out there 👍🏻!!

And speaking of emotional AGONY 😩! HOLY BOJANGLES 😲! The three spin-offs ‘In Another Life’… WHAT. THE. HECK. ANGIE!!!!!!! 😩😩😩 I literally put my book down, walked to the gas station, bought a bottle of wine 🍷, got some tissues, and then SOBBED 😭😭😭 my eyes out while yep, continuing to reading IAL Book 3 😂😂😂! TO THIS DAY, with all the books I have read (and if you follow my reviews, you know there are QUITE a FEW 😉😂!,) I think this one takes the emotional CAKE 🎂! It was so GENIUS 💡, but SO HEARTBREAKING 💔💔💔! For all who wonder what’s the deal with the IAL books… it’s a VISION 💭 being shown to Ara of what COULD have happened. But it’s KEY 🔑 to the main saga, so they can’t be skipped! And if you thought the MAIN SAGA was BRUTAL 😩… WOW 😲… just imagine how bad THIS is since it is literally NOT the path that was chosen for Ara because it is MORE BRUTAL than the MAIN SAGA 😲😲😲!

A lot of people start this series and mistakenly think it is YA. And I GET IT 👌🏻! MOST of book 1 feels that way! But just HOLD on to your HATS 🎩 folks, it is soooooo NOT YA and once you get on that emotional rollercoaster 🎢 … it just does NOT STOP! There is STEAM 🔥 (NOT tons, but the non-romantic plotline is SO engrossing, you literally don’t care!) There is DRAMA 🎭 ! There are MIND BLOWING 🤯 twists 🌪 ! There is EMOTIONAL AGONY 😩😭😩! Honestly, it’s a BRILLIANT 💡series and the writing is TOP NOTCH 🤌🏻! This lady KNOWS what she is doing 👏🏻! There really is nothing else out there like this series! I usually try to say when recommending books… “If you like this series, then you’ll like this series.” But I LITERALLY CANNOT 🚫 with this one. There is NOTHING out there like this!!!

So if you LOVE to be constantly SUPRISED 😲 & SHOCKED 😵, you LOVE to read series that make you want to THROW YOUR BOOK 📕 (watch out, cuz it has happened to someone 😅!,) you LOVE the emotional AGONY 😩 of a love triangle 🔺 … but at the same time, LOVE that you KNOW 💡 it will ALL WORK OUT RIGHT in the end 💗💗💗… give this series a shot! It’s free on KU and you never know, it may JUST be the best kept SECRET 🤫 of a series that is PERFECTLY DARK 👌🏻 for you!

FYI Perfect Reading Order below (Spin-offs are CRUCIAL to main saga! Recommend getting the boxset with all books in the right order!)

💗Dark Secrets
💗The Heart's Ashes
💗Mark of Betrayal
💗Lies in Blood
💗Echoes: Part One of Echoes & Silence
💗Echoes: Part Two of Echoes & Silence
💜Bound 1 (spin-off)
💜Bound 2 (spin-off)
💗Bound by Secrets
🤍In Another Life 1 (spin-off)
🤍In Another Life 2 (spin-off)
🤍In Another Life 3 (spin-off)
🖤In My Blood (spin-off)
💗Heart of Darkness
💗Underworld

top_screaming.text:
ROGUE ONE TAKES PLACE RIGHT BEFORE THE EXCELLENT MOVIE THAT BEGAN IT ALL, STAR WARS 4. NOT SINCE THE EXCELLENT STAR WARS ADAPTATION FOR RADIO FROM NPR HAVE WE BEEN GIVEN SUCH GREAT BACKSTORY. THE WRITING, ACTING, AND SPECIAL EFFECTS ARE PERFECT! IT IS CLEAR THAT THE EXCELLENT CAST AND CREW WANTED TO PAINSTAKINGLY RECREATE THE LOOK AND FEEL OF "A NEW HOPE" EVEN INCLUDING A COUPLE OF ASTOUNDING ACTOR RECREATIONS! NOT SINCE BEAUTIFUL PRINCESS LEIA STOLE ALL OF THE BOYS HEARTS THAT WERE FANS FROM THE BEGINNING, INCLUDING ME, HAS A STAR WARIAN EFFECTED ME LIKE JYN, BOTH THE BEAUTIFUL CHILD AND GROWN WOMAN!
THE WRITERS HAD A TOUGH JOB AND MADE IT THROUGH WITH FLYING COLORS! I DETECTED 3 POSSIBLE INCONSISTANCIES. 1) STAR WARS 4 PRESENTED A DIFFERENT CHARACTER AS THE BUILDER OF THE BATTLESTATION. TO HIM VADER SAID, "DON'T BE TOO PROUD OF THIS STATION YOU HAVE CONSTRUCTED. IT IS INSIGNIFICANT TO THE POWER OF THE FORCE." HOWEVER, THE WAY I SEE IT, THE "DIRECTOR" IN ROGUE ONE DIRECTED THE WEAPON AND ITS POWER NEEDS WHILE SW4's "DIRECTOR" DIRECTED THE STATION OVERALL. 2) IN THE BEAUTIFUL MOMENT WHERE C3PO AND R2D2 SHARED LINES ABOUT WHERE EVERYONE WAS GOING, THEY ALSO HAD TO GO THERE TOO, BECAUSE THE DEATHSTAR PLANS WERE PLACED INTO R2 BY PRINCESS LEIA IN SW4. THE SOLUTION TO THIS APPARENT INCONSISTENCY IS THAT 3PO AND R2 JOINED THE REST OF THE DEPARTING GROUP SHORTLY AFTER WE SAW THEM, DEFINITELY PROVING THAT DROIDS ARE THE LAST TO KNOW WHAT'S GOING ON. 3) SW4 IMPLIED NO PREVIOUS USE OF THE DEATHSTAR WEAPON. RECALL THAT GRANDMOFF TARKEN SAID: "PRINCESS LEIA, BEFORE YOUR EXECUTION I WOULD LIKE FOR YOU TO BE A PART OF A CEREMONY THAT WILL MAKE THIS BATTLESTATION OPERATIONAL. I HAVE ELECTED TO TEST THIS STATION'S FIREPOWER ON YOUR HOMEWORLD OF ALDERAAN." THE WAY I SEE IT, THE ROGUE ONE FIRINGS WERE EXECUTED AT LOWER SETTINGS BECAUSE THE SCIENTISTS EXPRESSED CONCERN ABOUT POSSIBLE COLATERAL DAMAGE ON THE STATION ITSELF WHICH COULD HAVE CRIPPLED OR EVEN DESTOYED IT. ALSO, YOU WOULD CERTAINLY EXPECT PEACEFUL SCIENTISTS LIKE JYN'S FATHER TO DOWNPLAY THE POWER THAT COULD BE REALIZED FROM SUCH A WEAPON OF MASS DESTRUCTION. THESE SCIENTISTS WORKED IN FEAR FOR THEIR LIVES, AS YOU WOULD IF YOU WERE FORCED BY NAZIS TO DO SOMETHING HORRIBLE. WITH THE ORIGINAL SCIENTISTS DEAD BY THE TIME OF THE ALDERAAN TARGETING AND THE SUCCESS OF DESTROYING LARGE AREAS OF 2 WORLDS IN "ROGUE ONE" WITHOUT ANY STRAIN ON THE STATION, TARKIN MUST HAVE DECIDED TO RISK INCREASING THE WEAPONS OUTPUT TO OVERLOAD STRENGTH IN ORDER TO ENTIRELY BLOW UP ALDERAAN, AS ALDERAAN WAS ONE OF THE MOST SERIOUS THREATS TO SIDIOUS'S CONTINUED REIGN OF TERROR, IT'S DESTRUCTION WOULD TIGHTEN THE IMPERIAL GRIP, ELEVATE TARKIN AND ULTIMATELY INSURE THAT TARKIN BECOMES THE NEXT EMPEROR IN AN "UNFORTUNATE" EVENT," SUCH AS A SURPRISE BLOWING UP OF SIDIOUS'S HOME WORLD. THE ONLY QUESTION IN THE RUTHLESS TARKIN'S MIND, COULD VADER BE TRUSTED OR WOULD VADER ALSO HAVE TO "TRAGICALLY DIE." EVEN THOUGH SIDIOUS AND DARTH HAD SOME ABILITY TO FORSEE THINGS, I SPECULATE THAT TARKIN, LIKE HIS NOW DECEASED RIVAL COUNT DOOKU, ALSO SECRETLY HAD KNOWLEDGE AND USE OF THE FORCE. TARKIN'S CLEVER LINE IN SW4 THAT VADER IS ALL THAT IS LEFT OF THAT RELIGION MUST HAVE BEEN SAID TO ENHANCE HIS DECEPTION. HAD DOOKU SURVIVED, A STRUGGLE BETWEEN TARKIN AND HE WOULD SURELY HAVE ENSUED. WE COULD TELL FROM THE WAY THAT DOOKU ADMIRED THE DEATHSTAR HOLOGRAM IN SW2 THAT HE HAD EQUAL ASPIRATIONS TO TARKIN.
THE MOST AMAZING THING ABOUT ALLIANCES WITH NAZI TYPES (FEEKS AS I CALL THEM, PERTAINING TO FECAL MATTER, THE SCUM OF THE EARTH), IS THAT FEEKS ARE SELF SERVING, MONEY AND POWER WORSHIPPERS THAT DECEIVE EVERYONE INTO BELIEVING THAT THEY ARE ULTRA GOOD, LIKE SIDIOUS DID WITH THE JEDI OR THE ENDTIME ANTICHRIST WILL DO WITH THOSE THAT DON'T KNOW BIBLICAL PROPHECY. IN ACTUALITY, FEEKS ARE ULTRA EVIL AND WILL USUALLY DESTROY EVERYONE INVOLVED, EVEN THEIR OWN ALLIES ONCE THEY HAVE SERVED THEIR PURPOSE. RECALL, SIDIOUS'S BETRAYAL OF DOOKU, AND SENDING VADER TO KILL ALL HIS ALLIES. AS I KEEP SAYING STAR WARS IS THE PERFECT PORTRAYAL OF THE VERY REAL BATTLE OF GOOD VS EVIL PRESENTED IN A SCIENCE FICTION SETTING. HISTORY IS REPLETE WITH SIMILAR FECAL EXAMPLES, LIKE THE JAPANESE SURPRISE ATTACK ON PEARL HARBOR AND THE NAZI'S WW2 SURPRISE ATTACK ON THEIR RUSSIAN ALLY.
TO MY READERS, "BE CAREFUL THAT YOUR ASPIRATIONS DON'T CHOKE YOU UP" AS THEY ALWAYS DO TO THOSE THAT CONSIDER THEMSELVES SUPERIOR. SIDIOUS PROMISED ANAKIN ETERNAL LIFE BUT SIDIOUS'S WAYS LEAD TO ETERNAL DEATH OF THE SOUL. LOVE GOD AND TREAT ALL AS YOU WOULD WANT TO BE TREATED AND YOU SHALL HAVE ETERNAL BLISSFUL LIFE!
"SAMISHBAYWATCHER"
5/18/2017

top_screaming.text:
I purchased this item on February 22, 2018. I WAITED A LITTLE BIT BEFORE REVIEWING IT DUE TO A FEW ISSUES I HAD PLUS I WANTED TO SEE HOW IT HELD UP OVER A LITTLE BIT OF TIME.

INITIAL THOUGHT UPON FIRST ARRIVAL IN FEBRUARY/MARCH:

I HAD TO HELP THE DELIVERY GUY UNLOAD IT BECAUSE IT WAS WAY TOO HEAVY FOR JUST HIM - EVEN THE BOX SAID TEAM LIFT.

***ITS SUPER HEAVY***

I WAS A MAINTENCE WOMAN WORKER FOR MANY YRS AT A TRUCK STOP AND WAS USED TO VERY HEAVY LIFTING OF WELL OVER 100 POUNDS BY MYSELF WITHOUT STRUGGLING AT ALL TO DO IT.

THE ITEM DESCRIPTION STATED IT WAS ONLY 90 POUNDS BUT I AM TELLING YOU IT IS A LOT HEAVIER THEN THAT. THE GUY COULDN'T GET IT OUT OF THE DELIVERY TRUCK. I HAD TO JUMP IN HIS TRUCK AND BOTH OF US COULD BARELY LIFT IT.

DO NOT BE SCARED OFF BY THE WEIGHT - SOMETIMES QUALITY WEIGHS MORE - THATS MY NEW PICKUP LINE AND EXCUSE NOW AFTER HAVING 4 KIDS :) KIDDING HA HA

ANYWAYS THIS SET IS AIR TIGHT VACCUMED IN THE BOX AND WHILE WE ALL KNOW WHEN SOMETHING IS AIR TIGHT VACUMM SEALED IT WILL POOF OUT AND EXPAND, BUT LET ME TELL YOU THIS NOW DO NOT CUT THE PLASTIC TO OPEN IT BY ANY WINDOWS. WHILE I KNEW IT WOULD POP OUT AND POOF UP I DIDN'T REALIZE JUST HOW MUCH OR HOW FAST IT WOULD DO THIS UPON OPENING IT. I HAVE MY BED BY THE WINDOW AND I WENT FROM JUST A MATTRESS ON THE GROUND TO THIS AMAZING BED BECAUSE WITH 4 KIDS I ALWAYS GET THEIR NEEDS AHEAD OF MINE, BUT I DECIDED AFTER 5 YRS OF BASICLY SLEEPING ON THE FLOOR (OLD MATRESS WAS SO THIN AND FLAT) THAT I NEEDED AND DESERVED A GOOD BED.

SO I PLACED DOWN THE BOX SPRINGS THAT CAME WITH THIS (NEVER HAD ANY BEFORE) THEY WERE SIMPLE TO DO- IT IS LITERALLY 2 TWIN SIZED BOX SPRINGS TOGETHER BUT SEPERATE ( YOU COULD BUY 2 TWIN MATTRESSES AND HAVE 2 BEDS SINCE THESE ARE 2 TWIN BOX SPRINGS THAT SIMPLY SLIDE AGAINST EACHOTHER TO FORM THE CALI KING SIZE FRAME THAT I BOUGHT) (I STOOD OLD CALI MATRESS STRAIGHT UP AND SLID AWAY FROM WHERE IT WAS) THESE BOX SPRING HAVE A HINGE AND LITTERALLY UNFOLD AND GO FLAT TO FORM A TWIN BOX SPRING - THERES 2 TWIN BOZ SPRINGS THAT PUSH AGAINST EACH OTHER TO MAKE THE CALI BOX SPRING - NO CONNECTORS NO TOOLS.

WHILE THE BOX SPRINGS LITTERALLY UNFOLD WITH NO ASSEMBLY AT ALL THEY ARE TRASH - THEY ARE CHEAP MADE WITH MINIMAL CONSTRUCTION AND SIMPLY A PIECE OF FABRIC SEWN OVER IT. FOR $614 DOLLARS (PRICES CHANGE - THATS WHAT I SPENT AT THAT TIME) I EXPECTED QUALITY OR AT LEAST NOT CHEAPLY MADE BOX SPRINGS. I ABSOLUTLEY CANNOT RECOMEND THESE BOX SPRINGS DUE TO QUALITY LACKING. THEY WILL WORK OUT OK FOR ME FOR A SHORT TIME ( I WILL USE IT PROBABLY FOREVER - HECK I SLEPT ON ONLY A THIN MATRESS FOR 5 YRS ON THE FLOOR BASICLY HA HA HA), BUT I DO EXPECT THEM TO BREAK QUICKLY BECAUSE THEY FEEL LIKE THEY WILL PUSH THROUGH AND BREAK THE THIN WOOD FROM NORMAL USE AND PRESSURE OF WEIGHT LAYING/SLEEPING ON TOP OF IT PLUS DUE TO THE WEIGHT OF THE MATRESS WITHOUT EVEN BEING ON IT.

I HAVE KIDS AS MENTIONED AND MY YOUNGEST ARE 6 AND 8 YRS OLD. WHILE OBVIOUSLY KIDS SHOULD NEVER JUMP ON BEDS THEY SOMETIMES DO THIS EVEN AFTER BEING TOLD NOT TO - COMMON NOW WE AS PARENTS KNOW THE THINGS KIDS DO. AND LET ME JUST SAY IF THEY JUMP ON MY BED ONCE IT WILL CAUSE THE CHEAP THIN WOOD IN THE BOX SPRINGS TO BREAK AND IF THAT HAPPENS I WILL BE FORCED TO HAVE TO THROW THE BOX SPRINGS OUT BECAUSE IF NOT THE WOOD WILL STAB INTO THE MATTRESS ON TOP AND START TO TARE IT OR PUT A HOLE INTO IT.

BACK TO OPENING THE MATTRESS FROM THE PLASTIC BY THE WINDOW.

WHILE I KNEW BEING VACUUM SEALED WOULD POP OPEN AND PUFF UP I NEVER KNEW THE AMOUNT OF FORCE THIS WOULD ACTUALLY CAUSE. I WEIGH ABOUT 130 POUNDS AND AM IN PRETTY GOOD SHAPE, SO WHEN I STARTED OPENING THE PLASTIC TO RELEASE THE MATTRESS FROM THE VACUUM SEALED PLASTIC I PUT MY BODY/WEIGHT AGAINST IT AS I MADE A VERY SMALL SCISSORS CUT TO BEGIN TEARING THE PLASTIC. I HAVE BOUGHT VACUUM SEALED MATTRESSES BEFORE AND KNOW HOW YOU NEED TO ALLOW IT TO POP UP AND OUT SLOWLY. WELL THIS SMALL HOLE WAS ENOUGH TO CAUSE THE ENTIRE MATTRESS TO RIP FROM THE BAG WITH SUCH FORCE I KID YOU NOT IT THREW ME NOT ONLY AGAINST BUT THROUGH MY GLASS BEDROOM WINDOW BREAKING IT AND LITERALLY THROWING ME OUTSIDE THROUGH MY WINDOW AS I HAD THE BOX SPRINGS ON THE FLOOR AND THE MATTRESS ON TOP OPENING IT / SETTING IT UP. I AM FINE BUT MY WINDOW WASN'T. I ONLY GOT MAYBE 2 SMALL CUTS ON ME FROM THE GLASS. NO WORRIES BUT BEWARE DO NOT OPEN THIS NEAR ANY WINDOWS FOR REAL! LAST THING I EXPECTED WHILE BUYING AND SETTING UP A BED WAS THE NEED OF HAVING TO REPLACE A GLASS WINDOW. LUCKILY AS I SAID I AM FINE AND I LIVE FIRST FLOOR, COULD HAVE BEEN MUCH WORSE.

THE MATTRESS:

THE MATTRESS IS AMAZING! HANDS DOWN THE BEST MATTRESS I HAVE EVER HAD MY WHOLE LIFE AND THAT INCLUDES THE MANY MATTRESSES THAT I HAVE PURCHASED FOR MY KIDS OVER THE YRS. THE QUALITY OF THE MATTRESS FROM THICKNESS TO THE ACTUAL MATERIAL BEING DURABLE AND STRONG IS AMAZING. THE MATTRESS WAS MADE TO LAST. THE MATTRESS AND THE FACT I WOULD NEVER MAKE MYSELF LIFT THIS AGAIN WERE THE ONLY 2 REASONS THIS DID NOT GET RETURNED.

MY OVERALL IMPRESSION SUMMED UP:

BOX SPRINGS ARE COMPLETE JUNK
THE MATTRESS MAY THROW YOU THROUGH A GLASS WINDOW FROM VACUUM SEALED FORCE ERUPTING WHEN OPENING THE PLASTIC
THE QUALITY OF THE MATTRESS IS AMAZING

WOULD I RECOMEND THIS SET?

NO - I FEEL FOR $614 (WHAT I PD AT THE TIME - PRICES MAY CHANGE) I COULD HAVE GOTTEN A BETTER QUALITY SET.

top_screaming.text:
LOVE ON THE EDGE/BOX SET

EVER HOPEFUL
SPOUSAL ABUSE IS A TERRIBLE THING FOR ANYONE TO GO THROUGH. WHEN I STARTING READING THIS STORY IT WAS LIKE DÉJÀ VU FOR ME, I HAD TO STOP READING FOR A MINUTE (had to get a grip). THE HEALING PROCESS FROM ABUSE CAN BE VERY HARD OR EASY DEPENDING ON THE PERSON. I KNOW FIRST HAND THE SOLUTIONS TO GETTING OVER THE RESIDUE OF ABUSE WERE SPOT-ON IN THIS BOOK. THE STORY WAS VERY INFORMATIVE AND WEAVED INTO A ROMANTIC LOVE STORY. I THINK IT WILL BE A VERY GOOD SERIES, ESPECIALLY IF THEY REMAIN STAND ALONES. LOVE READING ABOUT SMALL TOWN LIFE.
THE LAST ENEMY
THIS REMINDED ME OF ONE OF MY FAVORITE OLD BW MOVIES, “LAURA” LAWMAN FALLS FOR A WOMAN THOUGHT KILLED. THIS ALL HAPPENS WHILE HE WORKS ON SOLVING HER MURDER, THIS STORY LINE CHANGES BIG TIME AFTER THAT SIMULARITY. THE KILLER REALLY GAVE ME THE CHILLS WHEN FIRST INTRODUCED IN THE STORY. STARTING OUT I WAS ENJOYING THIS SO MUCH BUT THAT SOON CHANGED. AFTER SUCH AN EXCITING BEGINNING IT STARTED TO GO DOWNHILL FOR ME. IT BECAME TOO WORDY, ANGSTY, KINDA CONFUSING AND REPETATIVE THEN JUST BORING, I WISHED FOR THE END. I THINK THIS WOULD HAVE BEEN A BETTER READ HAD IT NOT BEEN DRAGGED OUT SO MUCH.
THE GOOD DAUGHTER
MARISA IS A MAFIA PRINCESS, TRYING NOT TO BECOME AN INHUMAN MONSTER LIKE THE REST OF HER FAMILY. THIS BOOK REMINDED ME OF THE SAPRANOS, THE FIRST COUPLE OF SEASONS BEFORE THEY CAVED TO PUBLIC OPINION (or ran out of good writing materials) BECAUSE OF THE VIOLENCE, I GUESS. I STOPPED WATCHIN IT GOT KINDA BORING TO ME, I LIKED THE VIOLENCE. I COULD SEE THIS AS AN ACTION-PACKED-NAIL-BITER-MOVIE, LOTS OF EXCITING STUFF GOING ON THROUGHOUT THE BOOK. USUALLY I DON’T READ THIS TYPE OF GENRE (don’t like mafia crime) I WILL WATCH IT BUT DON’T LIKE READING IT. THE BOOK WAS A LITTLE LENTHY, DIDN’T LIKE THE ENDING BUT NOT A BAD READ.
HIDE’N GO SEEK
THIS IS THE SECOND BOOK IN THIS PHYSIC SERIES EACH A STAND ALONE (omg! I love that they are) I LOVE THEM. EACH BOOK HAS THAT PHYSIC FLARE, FILLED WITH ROMANCE, SCARY KILLERS, EXCITEMENT, GREAT LOVABLE CHARACTERS AND BEST OF ALL STEFAN. SIGH!! I REALLY LOVE STEFAN. THIS BOOK HAD A SURPRISE ENDING I DIDN'T SEE COMING, I LIKE WHEN THAT HAPPENS. ITS NOT OFTEN AN AUTHOR CAN DO THAT TO ME, I READ SO MUCH I USUALLY FIGURE OUT WHO-DONE-IT EARLY ON IN THE BOOK. BRAVO! NOW ALL I'M HOPING FOR IS IF THE NEXT BOOK HAS MY NEW BOOK BOY FRIEND IN IT. . . . STEFAN (a girl can dream, can't she). ;D (PREVIOUSLY READ IN A SINGLE)
DANGEROUS FLAMES
ANOTHER MAFIA PRINCESS, GABI THINKS SHE WANTS TO BECOME MORE INVOLVED IN THE FAMILY BUSINESS. MIK, WHO WORKS FOR HER FATHER WANTS TO BECOME MORE INVOLVED WITH HER. FAMILY LIFE IS ABOUT TO GET A WHOLE LOT MORE INTERESTING FOR THE TWO OF THEM.
LOVE ME IF YOU CAN
PI SCOTT HOLT AND POLICE DETECTIVE TESS O’MALLEY HOOK UP TRYING TO SOLVE A 14YR OLD & A NEW MURDER CASE. JOINING FORCES PROVES THAT THE TWO CASES ARE CONNECTED THOUGH YEARS APART. THE MURDER CASES MIGHT BE HEATING UP BUT SO IS THEIR RELATIONSHIP IT’S ABOUT TO BURST INTO FLAMES THAT ONLY THEY CAN PUT OUT. WINK-WINK! PRETTY FUN READ THE BACK & FORTH BANTER BETWEEN CHARACTERS WAS LOL AT TIMES. ENDING WAS A BIT DRAWN OUT.
ALL IN THE NAME OF LOVE
MOB CRIME STORY, ORDINARY LOOKING GIRL BEING CHASED BY THEM, GETS HELPED BY HOTT MOVIE STAR GUY. EXCITING AND VERY SEXY PREDICTABLE OUTCOME BUT I WAS PLEASED, I GOT MY HEA. NOT A VERY LONG BOOK.
MEANT FOR HER
LOTS OF MYSTERY, A REAL WHO DID WHAT, TRAITORS, CODES, KILLERS AND ROMANCE. DID THEY? I ENJOYED THE MAIN CHACRACTER'S HANK & JULIE FALLING IN LOVE WHILE NOT BEING ABLE TO TRUST ALMOST ANYONE, EVEN EACH OTHER. VERY SWEET COMBINATION! (PREVIOUSLY READ AS STAND ALONE)
DARING TO LOVE
VERY DIFFERENT KINDA READ FOR ME, I REALLY ENJOYED IT. GALEN & LIZ BOTH WORK FOR ETCETERA, A GOVERNMENT AGENCY WHICH DEALS WITH AGENTS WITH PSYCHIC ABILITIES. THE STORY LINE HAD SO MANY THINGS TO TRY AND FIGURE OUT; FAMILY SECRETS, KIDNAPPING, CHILD ABUSE, MYSTERY, ROMANCE AND HOTT STEAMY SEXY SEX SCENES. THE PSYCHIC DETECTIVES HAVE SOME AMAZING AND POWERFUL GIFTS, REMINDED ME A LITTE OF THE XMEN.

OVER-ALL I ENJOYED READING, EVEN THOUGH A COUPLE OF THE STORY LINES WEREN’T MY CUP OF TEA. NICE BOOK COVER, THAT GUY IS HOTT! ;D (RECEIVED AS FREE ARC FROM THE AUTHOR ALSO PURCHASED ON AMAZON)
top_screaming.title: GREAT READING!

top_screaming.text: HEY....I HAVE TO DISAGREE WITH THE OTHER REVIEWS HERE. I PURCHASED 'KILLING BIRDS' ABOUT A YEAR AGO AND TOTALLY ENJOYED IT FOR MANY REASONS. FIRST OFF...YEA, IT ISN'T A ZOMBIE MOVIE..AT LEAST NOT LIKE 'ZOMBIE' OR 'DAWN OF THE DEAD'...BUT AS YOU KNOW, WHEN SEEKING OUT OBSCURE AND LOW-BUDGET MOVIES, THE STUDIO WILL USUALLY TAG THEIR FLIC WITH A VERY POPULAR AND COMMERCIAL BRAND NAME. (the Howling, Witchcraft,etc) to DRAW IN VIEWERS...IF YOU'RE AN AVID HORROR/sSCI-FI fan...well,then YOU SHOULD KNOW THIS BY NOW..?  WHAT IS ALSO VERY 'KOOL' AND STILL HAS ME SEARCHING THE MOVIE ARCHIVES HERE ON AMAZON..IS THAT I'M FINDING HUNDREDS OF FILMS THAT I'VE NEVER SEEN BEFORE...THANX TO THE WONDER OF DIGITAL MOVIES! I GREW UP IN THE 80S AND I'M A TOTAL RETRO-FLASHBACK 80'S DUDE! BUT NOW, I'M WATCHING AND STUDYING ANYTHING I CAN GET MY HANDS ON........THIS BRINGS ME TO MY 'DISCOVERY' OF SOME OF THE ZOMBIE SEQUEALS.  TO ME...SORRY GUYS, 'THE KILLING BIRDS' WAS AN AWESOME RARE FIND....THIS WOULD OF BEEN ONE OF THOSE MOVIES ON VHS THAT I WOULD HAVE PROBABLY 'BURNED' UP IN MY VCR PLAYER...LIKE 'CHILDREN OF THE CORN, JUST BEFORE DAWN, NIGHT OF THE COMET...THE FUNHOUSE!!'  'KILLING BIRDS' LOOKS, TASTES AND SMELLS LIKE A 1980 CHEEZE-FLICK. FIRST, IT DOES THAT OPENING 'PROLOGUE' OF A HORRIBLE HAPPENING...THEN...FLASHES SEVERAL YEARS LATER TO A COLLEGE CAMPUS TO INTRODUCE THE BLAND KIDS. THE BOYS ARE VERY SOFT AND THE CLOTHES VERY..the GAP..?..matter of fact, tHE ENTIRE MOVIE HAS THIS REALLY NIFTY HAZE TO IT...EVERYTHING IS VERY PASTEL AND THE KIDS QUIET AND SOFTLY SPOKEN...(think..THE KINDRED..ELM STREET...VALLEY GIRL...APRIL FOOLS DAY,DEFINATELY!!)  why wasn't this movie on our VIDEO SHELVES in the 80's.....?....who cares...I FOUND IT NOW. THE MOVIE ALSO MADE ME THINK OF 'EXQUINOX'..'SLAUGHTERHOUSE'..'BLOODY NEW YEAR'...AND A EVIL-DEAD RIP OFF CALLED 'DEMON WIND'. IF YOU KNOW ANY OF THESE LITTLE LOW-BUDGET MOVIES...AND MAY HAVE LIKED THEM..THEN YOU MAY 'ENJOY' 'KILLING BIRDS'...OR AT LEAST, GET A WARM,COZY FEELING INSIDE FROM WATCHING AND REMEMBERING HOW 'SIMPLE' IT WAS TO TELL A DECENT STORY WITHOUT CGI AND BUCKETS OF BLOOD.....MATTER OF FACT, THE 'PACE' IS DEFINATELY SLOW..BUT AFTER REALLY WATCHING THIS MOVIE..IT SUDDENLY HIT ME 'HARD' THAT THE MOVIE'S UNDER CURRENT WAS SORT OF LIKE EARLY JOHN CARPENTER....'KILLING BIRDS' SIMPLY BUILDS AND BUILDS WITH ECHOES OF 'ERRIE' CHIMES AND ALSO ACTUALLY USES WHITE SMOKE AND FOG TO CREATE IT'S ATMOSPHERE. THE PLOT IS SIMPLE..BUNCH OF KIDS GO ON AN OUTING TO GO...BIRD WATCHING...(FOR REAL!)..IN THE FOREST..STUMPLE APOND A DEAD BODY AND END UP STRANDED IN AN ISOLATED HOUSE IN THE MIDDLE OF 'EVIL DEAD' LAND....THE 'TEENS' MOVE THRU THE MOVIE IN SUCH MELODRAMATIC FASHION, WALKING IN AND OUT OF DREAM-LIKE SITUATIONS..THAT YOU WILL EITHER GO WITH..(LIKE AN OLD GHOST STORY)..OR NOT..IF YOU 'WANT' FAST PACE AND LIGHTNING LIKE SPEED THEN OF COURSE THIS ISN'T FOR YOU.....I HOWEVER, CHEWED IT UP...ESPECIALLY WHEN THE 'PREPPIE' KIDS ARE TRAPPED IN THE VAN..AND THE 'DEAD' START TO CLOSE IN ON THEM....THE CUTS ARE QUICK, THE PRETTY KIDS BREATHING AND SWEATING HARD..THE 'HALLOWEEN' LIKE TECHNO MUSIC IS PLAYING WITH GLEE AND HUGE BRIGHT WHITE LIGHTS OF FOG SURROUND THEM...(echoes of THE FOG and PRINCE OF DARKNESS)...of course, nothing in my eyes come close to CARPENTER or TOBE HOOPER'S THE FUNHOUSE..(my all time wet-dream favorite!!)...BUT I GUESS I JUST ADMIRE VERY LOW-BUDGET FILMS THAT MAKE A 'BUCK' STRETCH AS FOR AS IT GOES. I ALSO LOVE THE CONCLUSION WHEN THE LAST 'KIDS' LOCK THEMSELVES IN THE DUSTY ATTIC AND THE MUSIC PLAYING REMINDED ME OF 'ANGELS' OR A CHORUS HUMMING...SORT OF LIKE A VERY,VERY LOW-BUDGET DARIO ARGENTO.....LOVE THIS SCENE...THE QUICK CUTS OF THE FRANTIC KIDS SEEM TO MELT BACK AND FORTH WITH THE MUSIC...CREATING ONCE AGAIN A VERY DREAMY 'NOT OF THIS' EARTH KINDA ATMOSPHERE..OH YEA..AND NOT THAT IT REALLY MATTERS, BUT THE LAST SURVIVING PRETTY BOY HAS A 'CONNECTION' WITH THE BIRDS..OR 'PHANTOMS'..OR 'KILLER'..OR...THAT'S RIGHT..HE'S RELATED TO THE...OH..it really doesn't matter..IT'S MORE ABOUT THE 'MOOD'  of the 'MOMENT!'.....ANYWAY, IF YOU ENJOY EARLY 80'S FILMS.(SUPERSTITION,THE OUTING,SLAUGHTER HIGH,SLAUGHTERHOUSE ROCK,CHOPPING MALL,the ZERO BOYS)I WOULD GIVE THIS A TRY....OH MY GOD...THAT'S WHO THE BOYS REMINDED ME OF...I JUST FIGURED IT OUT..AHA! THAT POP GROUP AHA.. the''TAKE ON ME..'' MTV MUSIC VIDEO...ya know, when that PRETTY GIRL GETS SUCKED INTO THAT COMIC BOOK AND FALLS IN LOVE WITH THE CARTOON GUY...yea....very,very 80'S...and 'KILLING BIRDS' has that style.....!! thanx for reading....KEVIN BRIAN....be my bloody VALENTINE...or ELSE!!!
top_screaming.title: A VERY KOOL,RETRO THROWBACK TO THE EARLY 80'S!!

top_screaming.text:
BOY, DID MY HEART FLUTTER NUMEROUS TIMES WHILE READING THIS BOOK. I MEAN YOU HAVE THE QUINTESSENTIAL “GOOD GIRL” MEETS “BAD BOY”BUT ANNIE RAINS DEFINITELY UPS THE CUTENESS FACTOR BY ADDING DOGS INTO THE MIX AS WELL AS TONS OF EMOTION AS YOU WATCH GRIFFIN TRY AND ADAPT TO HIS MOTHER AND WHO SHE IS AFTER BEING DIAGNOSED WITH EARLY ONSET ALZHEIMER’S. ON TOP OF THAT, VAL WHO IS SUPPOSE TO BE OUR “GOOD GIRL” AS SHE IS THE DAUGHTER OF A RESPECTABLE PREACHER SECRETLY WRITES ROMANCE NOVELS UNDER A PEN NAME. AS SOMEONE WHO HAS DREAMS OF WRITING HER OWN ROMANCE NOVEL ONE DAY AND WHO ALSO HAS SEEN WHAT ALZHEIMER’S CAN DO TO SOMEONE THEY LOVE, THIS BOOK WAS GIVING ME ALL THE FEELS.

THIS IS MY FIRST ANNIE RAINS’S BOOK SO I WAS NOT TOO FAMILIAR TO THE WORLD SHE HAD CREATED IN THIS SERIES. DESPITE THE INITIAL CONFUSION ON WHO THE SECONDARY CHARACTERS WERE AND HOW THEY FIT WITHIN THE STORY, I REALLY ENJOYED STEPPING INTO THIS WORLD WHERE THERE IS A MILITARY COMMUNITY AT ITS CENTER. IT HAS BEEN A WHILE SINCE I HAVE READ A ROMANCE WHERE THE MILITARY IS PRESENT SO IT WAS GREAT TO STEP BACK INTO IT ESPECIALLY SINCE IT WAS IN A MORE CONTEMPORARY SETTING AS OPPOSED TO THE MORE SUSPENSEFUL BOOKS I HAVE READ IN THE PAST.OUR FIRST LOOK AT THIS MILITARY COMMUNITY IS THROUGH GRIFFIN AND HIS JOB AS A MILITARY K-9 OFFICER. I ABSOLUTELY LOVED THAT GRIFFIN WORKED ALONGSIDE DOGS AND THAT HE FELT AND CARED SO MUCH FOR THE DOGS HE WORKED WITH AS WELL AS HIS OWN DOG TROOPER WHO WAS WITH HIM WHEN HE HIMSELF WAS IN THE MILITARY. THE DOG ELEMENT, BOTH WITH GRIFFIN AND VAL, JUST GAVE THE BOOK A HEART-WARMING FEEL TO IT ESPECIALLY SINCE IT IS BECAUSE OF A DOG THAT THEY HAD THEIR FIRST INTERACTION WITH ONE ANOTHER. THE CUTE ASPECT OF THEIR “MEET-CUTE” MOMENT GOES TO THE DOG THAT VAL IS LOOKING AFTER, SWEET CHEEKS, BUT THE MOMENT IS ANYTHING BUT GIVEN THE FACT THAT VAL ALMOST RAN GRIFFIN OFF THE ROAD. GRIFFIN, IN TURN, DECIDES TO LET HIS FEELINGS OF VAL NOT TAKING THE TIME TO TRAIN THE DOG PROPERLY INFLUENCE HIS IMPRESSION OF HER. IT IS ONLY UNTIL AFTER VAL CONFRONTS HIM FOR HIS BEHAVIOR THAT GRIFFIN LEARNS SHE IS ONLY LOOKING AFTER THE DOG FOR ALMA, AN ELDERLY WOMEN RECOVERING FROM HIP SURGERY IN THE NURSING HOME WHERE VAL VOLUNTEERS AND WHERE GRIFFIN’S MOTHER NOW LIVES.

THOUGH THEY HAVE THEIR DIFFERENCES, VAL BEING THE “GOOD GIRL” AS A PREACHER’S DAUGHTER WHO VOLUNTEERS READING TO THE ELDERLY WOMEN AT THE NURSING HOME AND GRIFFIN BEING THE “BAD BOY” WHO HAS TATTOOS AND RIDES A MOTORCYCLE, THEY ALSO HAVE A FEW SIMILARITIES THAT ALLOW THEM TO SLOWLY GET TO KNOW ONE ANOTHER. A DOG CAUSES THEM TO MEET BUT IT IS THE NURSING HOME THAT ALSO PLAYS A ROLE IN THE BEGINNINGS OF THEIR RELATIONSHIP ESPECIALLY SINCE GRIFFIN’S MOTHER IS PART OF THE BOOK CLUB THAT VAL RUNS. THE FACT THAT VAL VOLUNTEERS HER TIME READING TO THESE WOMEN BECAUSE OF THE CONNECTION SHE HAS TO READING SEEING AS IT INSPIRED HER TO BECOME A WRITER WAS ABSOLUTELY WONDERFUL. VAL’S BELIEFS ON READING AND HER SECRET LIFE AS A ROMANCE WRITER IS WHAT TRULY CONNECTED ME TO HER CHARACTER. SHE BRINGS SUCH JOY TO THESE WOMEN’S LIVES EVEN IF GRIFFIN WHOSE MOTHER SEEMS TO ENJOY THE BOOKCLUB KNOWS THIS IS NOT WHO HIS MOTHER ONCE WAS. GRIFFIN’S ISSUE WITH THE BOOKCLUB AND HOW IT IS CHANGING THE MOTHER HE ONCE KNEW IS JUST ONE EXAMPLE OF HIS STRUGGLE DEALING WITH THE FACT THAT HIS MOTHER HAS ALZHEIMER’S. THIS ONCE RESPECTED ACADEMIC WHO WOULDN’T BE CAUGHT DEAD LISTENING TO A ROMANCE NOVEL BEFORE HER DIAGNOSIS IS WHO HE WANTS BACK MORE THAN ANYTHING IN THE WORLD. GIVEN THE FACT THAT MY GRANDMOTHER HAD ALZHEIMER’S AND THAT I SLOWLY WATCHED HER DISAPPEAR IN FRONT OF MY EYES WHEN I VISITED HER, I KNOW EXACTLY HOW GRIFFIN FELT AND UNDERSTOOD HIS PAIN AS WELL AS THE FRUSTRATION HE EXPERIENCED. IT IS THIS ASPECT OF THE NOVEL THAT REALLY PULLED ON MY HEART STRINGS.

THERE IS SO MUCH THAT I CONNECTED TO AND FELT WHEN READING THIS NOVEL WHICH WAS SURPRISING BECAUSE IT TOOK ME A FEW CHAPTERS FOR ME TO GET INTO IT INITIALLY. BUT DESPITE THAT, IT WAS THE EMOTION AND HEART-WARMING MOMENTS THAT REELED ME IN GETTING ME READY FOR THE PASSION JUST BELOW THE SURFACE. I REALLY ENJOYED THIS BOOK AND HOPE TO READ MORE OF ANNIE RAINS IN THE FUTURE.
